top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p.SEX,
    COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    l.[T-BIL] IS NOT NULL 
    AND (l.[T-BIL] < 0.2 OR l.[T-BIL] > 1.2)  -- Assuming normal range: 0.2–1.2 mg/dL
GROUP BY 
    p.SEX;

SELECT p.SEX, COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-BIL" IS NOT NULL 
  AND (l."T-BIL" < 0.2 OR l."T-BIL" > 1.2)  -- assuming normal range is 0.2–1.2 mg/dL; adjust if needed
GROUP BY p.SEX;

SELECT 
    p.SEX,
    COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    l.[T-BIL] IS NOT NULL 
    AND (l.[T-BIL] < 0.2 OR l.[T-BIL] > 1.2)  -- Assuming normal range: 0.2–1.2 mg/dL
GROUP BY 
    p.SEX;

SELECT p.SEX, COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l."T-BIL" NOT BETWEEN 0.2 AND 1.2
  AND l."T-BIL" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.SEX;

WHERE

final.sql:
SELECT 
    p.SEX,
    COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    l.[T-BIL] IS NOT NULL 
    AND (l.[T-BIL] < 0.2 OR l.[T-BIL] > 1.2)  -- Assuming normal range: 0.2–1.2 mg/dL
GROUP BY 
    p.SEX;
